title: microcos laurifolia
intro: Microcos laurifolia, also known as the Pokok Hutan or Borneo Button Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Microcos laurifolia can be made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
